name: goal-diffusion-monorepo
description: Goal Diffusion monorepo: agent skill and Bun-built CLI.

scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter goal-diffusion typecheck && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: bun run --filter goal-diffusion test && bun test scripts
scripts.check: bun run build && bun run typecheck && bun run test
